# Document templates

Structure definitions and examples for the help document types supported by this repository.
Each template defines the required section order and formatting rules for a document type; pair it with the matching example when authoring a new document.


## Contents

* [how-to-guides-template-structure.md](./how-to-guides-template-structure.md) - Required section order and formatting rules for how-to guide documents.
* [how-to-guides-example.md](./how-to-guides-example.md) - A sample how-to guide that demonstrates the template in practice.
* [reference-document-template-structure.md](./reference-document-template-structure.md) - Required section order and formatting rules for reference documents.

See the parent [docs/README.md](../README.md) for the full writing style guide overview, and [docs/technical-doc-overview.md](../technical-doc-overview.md) for guidance on choosing a document type ([Diataxis](https://diataxis.fr/)).
